Off Calendar May-20-2026 Off Calendar

MOTION For Dismissal Of Entire Action; Memorandum Of Points & Authorities
Off Calendar Apr-27-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF RUBEN LEON'S MOTION FOR DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION

No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: granted. Good cause shown and no opposition filed. Judge Kahn notes that, although this case was singly assigned to Judge Schulman by order dated October 21, 2024, it appears that Judge Schulman intended his order of December 4, 2025 withdrawing complex designation to vacate the single assignment order and thus this motion may be heard and ruled on in department 301. Proposed order submitted for review. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (301/HEK)
